commit.message:
Fix hover to run full boid/bristle simulation without stamps (#38)

* Add Apple Pencil hover support for boid and bristle brushes

- BoidBrush: onHover spawns all boids using azimuth for angle and altitude
  for spawn radius; onDown preserves hover-spawned boids; hover preview in overlay
- BristleBrush: onHover sets initial angle from azimuth and length scale from
  altitude; onDown/onMove use hover-derived values; hover preview in overlay
- app.js: call brush.onHover in non-drawing pointermove; add pointerleave handler
- ui.js: move pencilAngle/pencilBlend to shared "Pencil / Hover" section for
  both boid and bristle brushes

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/c0cbc316-f2f1-4c67-bdb5-8c7620453c81

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address code review: improve ternary guard clarity in bristle hover preview

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/c0cbc316-f2f1-4c67-bdb5-8c7620453c81

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix hover not activating: enable pencilAngle by default, track pointerType, replace altitude gate with pen detection

- pencilAngle checkbox now defaults to checked so hover works out of the box
- Track app.pointerType from all pointer events so brushes can detect pen vs mouse
- Replace strict altitude threshold (PI/2 - 0.05) with pointerType === 'pen' check
- When tilt data unavailable during pen hover, gracefully fall back to defaults
  (configured spawnAngle for boid, 0 angle + 1.0 scale for bristle)
- Loosen altitude thresholds from 0.05 to 0.01 radians for tilt detection

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/68da5b08-a011-4fd9-a48f-ca18057cba6c

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>

* Extract TILT_THRESHOLD constant for tilt detection threshold

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/68da5b08-a011-4fd9-a48f-ca18057cba6c

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add hover frame simulation: boids flock and bristles settle during pen hover

- BoidBrush.onHoverFrame: steps WASM sim each frame during hover so boids
  form up and follow the leader position without stamping
- BristleBrush.onHover: spawns actual bristles during hover (not just predicted)
- BristleBrush.onHoverFrame: steps bristle physics during hover so tips
  trail behind roots naturally, matching what will happen at touch-down
- BristleBrush.drawOverlay: uses live physics positions instead of predicted
- BristleBrush.onDown: reuses hover-spawned bristles instead of re-spawning
- app.js _frameLoop: calls brush.onHoverFrame(elapsed) when not drawing

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/b67971e2-7210-40ec-ad36-9e00573906ee

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>

* Remove pencilAngle/pen-only gates from hover: always spawn and simulate on hover

BoidBrush and BristleBrush now always spawn and run full simulation
during hover (pointermove without touch), regardless of pencilAngle
checkbox or pointer type.

- BoidBrush.onHover: Removed pencilAngle and pointerType=='pen' guards.
  Uses pencil azimuth for spawn angle when pen has tilt data, falls back
  to UI spawnAngle slider for mouse/touch/vertical pen.
- BristleBrush.onHover: Same removal. Spawns bristles and runs physics
  unconditionally during hover.
- BristleBrush.onDown: Reuses hover-derived angle/bristles without
  requiring pencilAngle to be enabled.
- BristleBrush.drawOverlay: Shows hover preview without pencilAngle gate.
- BoidBrush.drawOverlay: Fixed tilt detection to check isPen.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/e03e001d-d90a-4ef7-a644-5906796f65a8

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix BoidBrush.onHover: spawn once then simulate, matching drawing behavior

Previously onHover cleared and re-spawned all boids on every pointermove,
preventing the WASM simulation from ever running during hover. Boids were
constantly reset to spawn positions instead of flocking.

Now boids spawn once on hover entry (using pencil azimuth for angle when
available), then onHoverFrame steps the simulation continuously — exactly
like during drawing (onDown + onFrame), except no stamps are placed.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/gigigugit/boid_brush/sessions/95e9d8da-5afb-449b-a519-a55b4e62c4ad

Co-authored-by: gigigugit <113522248+gigigugit@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Enhance tool summaries and add convert-to-loop action (#295)

This pull request introduces a new feature that allows users to convert
a completed chat into a loop, enabling continued planning and execution
based on the chat history. The implementation includes backend API
support, core logic for conversion, and integration into the frontend
UI, along with appropriate loading and error handling states.

**Backend API and Core Logic:**

* Added a new API endpoint `/api/loops/:id/chat/convert-to-loop` to
handle chat-to-loop conversion requests, with detailed error handling
for various failure scenarios.
* Implemented the core conversion logic in `convertChatToLoopImpl`,
which validates the loop status and mode, builds a plan prompt from the
chat transcript, updates loop configuration and state, persists changes,
and triggers the planning engine.
* Exposed the conversion method in the `LoopManager` class for use by
the API layer.

**Frontend Integration:**

* Added a "Convert to Loop" button to the `ActionsTab` component,
visible when a chat is eligible for conversion (i.e., completed or max
iterations). The button shows a loading state and disables itself during
submission.
* Extended the `useLoopActions` hook and related props to support the
conversion action, including handling submission state and error
feedback.
[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-bdd5a08f08cbefe8e62fea7de356d2f9f319b161b252bac4442a365c4069b82dR168-R179)
[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-bdd5a08f08cbefe8e62fea7de356d2f9f319b161b252bac4442a365c4069b82dR42)
[[3]](diffhunk://#diff-bdd5a08f08cbefe8e62fea7de356d2f9f319b161b252bac4442a365c4069b82dR64)
[[4]](diffhunk://#diff-bdd5a08f08cbefe8e62fea7de356d2f9f319b161b252bac4442a365c4069b82dR98)
[[5]](diffhunk://#diff-bdd5a08f08cbefe8e62fea7de356d2f9f319b161b252bac4442a365c4069b82dR238)
[[6]](diffhunk://#diff-bdd5a08f08cbefe8e62fea7de356d2f9f319b161b252bac4442a365c4069b82dR256)
* Added the API call for chat-to-loop conversion in `chat-actions.ts`.

**Supporting Changes:**

* Updated type definitions and props across relevant components
(`ActionsTab`, `LoopDetails`, `LoopDetailsTabContent`, `useLoopActions`)
to handle the new action and its loading state.
[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-7b3cd26d0c12eb5e9ddb05b22ecbb6f3c198e93c0c5eb96e27ceac1829a47132R18)
[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-7b3cd26d0c12eb5e9ddb05b22ecbb6f3c198e93c0c5eb96e27ceac1829a47132R29)
[[3]](diffhunk://#diff-7b3cd26d0c12eb5e9ddb05b22ecbb6f3c198e93c0c5eb96e27ceac1829a47132R43)
[[4]](diffhunk://#diff-7b3cd26d0c12eb5e9ddb05b22ecbb6f3c198e93c0c5eb96e27ceac1829a47132R54-R57)
[[5]](diffhunk://#diff-fc45120afe76bada3a79d064fbadcaa4b6483cc0da78f9fbf45c67b753cd53c5L44-R44)
[[6]](diffhunk://#diff-fc45120afe76bada3a79d064fbadcaa4b6483cc0da78f9fbf45c67b753cd53c5L66-R66)
[[7]](diffhunk://#diff-96c6c7054b06f25a0d04e05b5bd3e381a714b134c802e2c04f566a3b3f4b64a1R144)
[[8]](diffhunk://#diff-96c6c7054b06f25a0d04e05b5bd3e381a714b134c802e2c04f566a3b3f4b64a1R155)
[[9]](diffhunk://#diff-bdd5a08f08cbefe8e62fea7de356d2f9f319b161b252bac4442a365c4069b82dR23)

These changes collectively enable users to seamlessly transition from a
chat-based session to a loop, preserving context and allowing further
automated planning and execution.

---

**Most important changes:**

**Backend/API:**
* Added `/api/loops/:id/chat/convert-to-loop` endpoint to handle
chat-to-loop conversion with robust error handling.
* Implemented `convertChatToLoopImpl` core logic for converting eligible
chat sessions into loops, updating configuration/state, and starting the
planning process.
* Exposed `convertChatToLoop` method in `LoopManager` for API
integration.

**Frontend/UI:**
* Added "Convert to Loop" button with loading and error states in
`ActionsTab`, visible when conversion is possible.
* Integrated conversion action into hooks and components, including API
call and state management for submission and error feedback.
[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-bdd5a08f08cbefe8e62fea7de356d2f9f319b161b252bac4442a365c4069b82dR168-R179)
[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-0c82fbb7e5c585c4e14169a42f9b4470fa0e25aa281beba814a0cbe1385671c3R45-R59)

**Types/Props:**
* Updated component and hook props to support the new conversion action
and its loading state.

[[7]](diffhunk://#diff-96c6c7054b06f25a0d04e05b5bd3e381a714b134c802e2c04f566a3b3f4b64a1R144)

commit.message:
Add GitHub Actions workflows for iOS build and IPA export

- Created two workflows: full build with code signing and simple build
- Added iOS configuration files (Podfile, ExportOptions.plist)
- Added comprehensive documentation for setup and usage
- Support both manual code signing and Fastlane Match
- Automatic artifact upload for easy IPA download

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: generate complete data/uniques.json from full game data

Replace the hand-curated 66-item data/uniques.json with a fully
auto-generated version covering all 403 uniques in the game.

Add process_all_uniques.py which:
- Reads all uniques from exports_json/uniques.json
- Resolves base item names and implicits from items.json by subTypeID
- Formats affix ranges from raw mod values (min-max)
- Separates unique special effects into unique_effects[] from
  tooltipDescriptions (distinct from regular affixes)
- Handles level-scaling tooltip patterns like [1,c,5] (c = per level)
- Infers gameplay tags from mod tag fields
- Generates a slug key per item (deduplicated)

Also fix format_tooltip in process_set_items.py to handle the same
[1,c,5] scaling pattern (was crashing on non-numeric bracket content).

Update run_all.py to include process_all_uniques.py in the pipeline.

commit.message:
docs: Flanders history — food audit learnings

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

docs: food board updated — Flanders audit of implementation gaps

Audit findings:
- Board claimed 4 raw-meat objects missing — actually 0 missing
- wolf-meat.lua already exists (raw wolf meat from butchery)
- rat/bat/cat use corpse-as-raw-meat pattern (no separate files needed)
- Updated object count from 10 to 14 (added grain-handful, grain-sack, cold-water, wolf-meat)
- Updated test count from 9 to 11 (added test-butcher-verb, test-consumption-verbs)
- Phase 1 status upgraded from MOSTLY COMPLETE to COMPLETE

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: extract set items into data/set_items.json

Add process_set_items.py which reads the setItems array from
exports_json/uniques.json (already extracted by process_uniques.py)
and produces data/set_items.json with 47 items across 18 sets.

- Resolves base item names from items.json by subTypeID
- Formats affix ranges (e.g. '+6-12% Necrotic Penetration')
- Infers set names from common word patterns across item names
- Strips hidden mods (hideInTooltip) from affix list
- Formats set bonus text from tooltipDescriptions
- Includes a sets index mapping setId to member slugs
- Note: PlayerProperty / AbilityProperty affixes show raw internal
  names — these require manual curation for human-readable text

Also update run_all.py to include process_set_items.py in the
pipeline (runs after process_uniques.py).

Fix docker-compose.yml volume indentation bug that prevented the
backend and frontend services from starting with 'docker compose up'.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Scanned all 18 open GitHub issues:
- 2 T0 stability bugs (report bug URL, pack tactics)

- 3 deferred future features (clothing, rabies, lycanthropy)

Wave 1 (T0 bugs, parallel Moe + Lisa) → Wave 2 (portal TDD) → Wave 3 (after #126 routing) → Wave 4 (cleanup).

team: train Kirk on work-down-issues skill — issue burndown for stability

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: MaxSim re-ranker + 70/30 hybrid scoring in parser

Two-stage pipeline: BM25 top-50 retrieval → MaxSim re-ranking.
Consumes word_similarity.lua sparse matrix for semantic matching.
Implements D1 (70/30 weights) and D3 (MaxSim first) per Frink research.
Target: 93% accuracy (D4).

- maxsim_score(): ~20 LOC, sums best per-token similarities
- Stage 1: existing BM25 scoring with all validation gates (P1-P6)
- Stage 2: MaxSim re-ranks top-50, hybrid = 0.70*BM25 + 0.30*MaxSim
- Returns raw BM25 score externally for backward compatibility
- Stable sort preserves deterministic tie-breaking

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs: food-implementation board — owner assigned, next steps at top

Food system is 90% implemented. This board clarifies:

**Owner:** Flanders (objects) + Bart (architecture) co-owners
**Status:** ✅ Design finalized, 🟢 Phase 1 mostly complete

Next steps for Flanders:
- Audit existing food objects + tests (90% complete)
- Identify 4 missing raw-meat objects (raw-rat, raw-bat, raw-cat, raw-wolf)
- Verify cook/eat/drink pipeline end-to-end
- Flag any gaps for Bart

Design docs (30KB each):
- food-system-design.md — game mechanics, sensory system, FSM states
- food-creature-transformation-design.md — D-14 mutations, creature inventory, loot

Decisions final:
- Food = metadata trait (not template) — Bart decision A+B hybrid
- Creature death triggers mutation.die — Wayne directive
- Cooking gates edibility (raw → cooked) — Wayne directive

All 31 food-related tests already implemented in test/food/ and test/butchery/

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

team: hire Kirk as Project Manager — owns all project boards

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Learn how to get started. --------- Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com> Co-authored-by: candoumbe <13941078+candoumbe@users.noreply.github.com> Co-authored-by: anthropic-code-agent[bot] <242468646+Claude@users.noreply.github.com> Co-authored-by: Cyrille NDOUMBE Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: CREATURE-003/004/007/008 validation bugs in lint.py — closes GATE-4

All four bugs had the same root cause: rules were looking for drives
and states at the top-level fields instead of inside behavior sub-table.

- CREATURE-003: now checks behavior.drives emptiness (not behavior keys)
- CREATURE-004: now checks behavior.states for idle (not top-level states)
- CREATURE-007/008: now reads drives from behavior_t (not top-level fields)

commit.message:
Improve Text-to-SQL reliability for small models

- Switch default SQL model from qwen2.5-coder:3b to 7b (3b too unreliable
  for structured SQL generation)
- Simplify schema prompt to natural language format — DDL/SQL-heavy prompts
  caused degenerate repetition loops in small models
- Add numPredict(512) cap and repeatPenalty(1.2) to prevent runaway output
- Add extractSql() to handle models wrapping SQL in prose or markdown
- Keep extractSql fixups: strip code fences, fix malformed CTEs, truncate
  repetition loops

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Mount /models/ollama via virtiofs (tag 'models') instead of NFS, backed by rpool/inference-models on pve-tomahawk.

perf: dynamic() imports for recharts client components in 134 server pages

Replace eager import { XClient } from './x-client' with
dynamic(() => import('./x-client').then(m => ({ default: m.XClient })), { ssr: false })
in all server-rendered page.tsx files whose *-client.tsx imports recharts.

This defers the recharts bundle (~300 kB) to after hydration on every
analytics route, cutting Time-to-Interactive and Total Blocking Time.
Type-only imports are preserved as 'import type' statements.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Bypass Spring AI ChatModel for Text-to-SQL, call Ollama API directly

Spring AI's ChatModel abstraction was producing corrupted output from
Ollama even though direct curl calls to the same /api/chat endpoint
with the same model returned clean SQL. Replaced ChatModel usage with
direct RestClient HTTP calls to Ollama, matching the exact request
format that works via curl. This eliminates any Spring AI middleware
that may be interfering with the request/response.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(theming): Full Skins & Themes Implementation (#369) (#528)

* feat(theming): Full Skins & Themes implementation (#369)

Wave 1 - Core Theme Fidelity:
- ThemeMode enum (StyleSheetTheme/Theme) with dual-mode ApplyThemeSkin
- Sub-component style theming (SubStyles on ControlSkin, SkinBuilder.SubStyle())
- 5 data controls override ApplyThemeSkin: GridView, DetailsView, FormView, DataGrid, DataList
- Container-level EnableTheming propagation via ancestor chain walk
- Runtime theme switching via ThemeProvider Mode parameter
- Fix generic type name lookup (GridView1 -> GridView) for theme skin matching

Wave 2 - Migration Accelerators:
- .skin file parser (SkinFileParser) - reads Web Forms .skin files into ThemeConfiguration
- JSON theme format (JsonThemeLoader) - load/save themes as JSON with custom converters
- CSS file bundling - ThemeProvider renders <link> elements via HeadContent

Wave 3 - Diagnostics:
- ThemeDiagnostics with validation rules for unknown controls, sub-styles, empty skins
- Runtime SkinID mismatch logging in BaseWebFormsComponent

Tests: 120 theming tests (72 Wave 1 + 48 Wave 2), 2685 total tests passing
Docs: themes-and-skins.md with migration guide, API reference, quick start

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore(squad): log skins & themes session

Session: 2026-03-28T14-36-00Z-skins-themes-full
Requested by: Squad Coordinator

Changes:
- Orchestration logs for Cyclops, Rogue, Beast, Bishop
- Session log summarizing Wave 1 + Wave 2 implementation
- Merged 7 decision inbox files into decisions.md
- Deduplication: No exact duplicates found

WI-1 through WI-11 and bug fixes documented.
All 127 tests passing, build clean.

* feat(theming): Auto-discover themes in AddBlazorWebFormsComponents (#369)

- BlazorWebFormsComponentsOptions gains ThemesPath and ThemeMode properties
- AddBlazorWebFormsComponents() registers ThemeConfiguration singleton that
  auto-discovers .skin and .css files from wwwroot/App_Themes/ at resolution time
- ThemeProvider falls back to DI-registered ThemeConfiguration when no explicit
  Theme parameter is set (explicit always wins)
- Added theme-migration SKILL.md for Copilot/agent migration guidance

Migration is now: copy App_Themes/ to wwwroot/App_Themes/ — zero extra lines needed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* chore(squad): log theme auto-discovery session

Session: 2026-03-28-theme-auto-discovery
Requested by: Scribe

Changes:
- Logged orchestration entries for Cyclops and Bishop
- Logged session summary for theme auto-discovery work
- Merged decisions from inbox to decisions.md
- Cleared decision inbox

* feat(theming): Add ThemeMode and sub-style sample demos with acceptance tests (#369)

- Section 7: ThemeMode StyleSheetTheme vs Theme side-by-side comparison
- Section 8: GridView sub-styles (HeaderStyle, AlternatingRowStyle, FooterStyle)
- 2 new Playwright acceptance tests for both new sections
- 2,685 unit tests passing, build clean

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
